{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231419584001595F78B7808F884D"}"},"total":1005},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7415549905718133566","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书塑造了一个不一样的末世。作者文笔很好。内容新颖丰富。剧情合理。人物塑造完美。某些看似无脑的行为其实另有铺垫。哪怕是一个圣母，其实也是另有用处。 主角有脑子。实力强，绝不把自己放在危险之中。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1726570545,"group_id":"7255552651020995599","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人不懒，好像留下了什么，但又好像没有","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9pItVDJmt8EEOKIAXcrRDU2szy+Fxon76pCOBziZ8F7","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/fdac487adfd446b48ed1f794f0d2cb8f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788715&x-signature=oSW21WRaxK4ic%2Fobbf5VDA41LlE%3D","user_id":"2559259817819451","user_name":"天命为何"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2559259817819451","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255552651020995599","book_info":{"abstract":"【全新题材】【末世脑洞】【绝对好看】
【末日+重生+无敌+超多女主+百张美图+杀伐果断+神话复苏+道法+异能+神魔传承+诸子百家传承】
末世来临，丧尸横行，异兽遍地。
江宇被兄弟出卖虐杀而死，重生末世之前，窃取天道传承，道法杀穿末世。
高冷女神开局白送新手体验券，绝美明星姐妹花跪求收下女子军团，傲娇小萝莉带着嫁妆求收留，嫁妆不多，一个城市而已，成熟御姐放出豪言：“今天你别想站着出去！！！”
江宇以无敌之势，斩落女神榜，屠尽实力榜，豢养上古女神，收服兵主蚩尤，横推诸子百家，傲立九州之巅。
PS：伏笔较多，以剧情故事为主，剧情偏阴暗，主角极度谨慎，人格轻度分裂，杀伐由心，玻璃心慎入。
缺点：很多很多很多女主，不喜勿入。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o3264a785c230045ea2a656e514e9df33~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"焚竹温酒","author_id":"","book_id":"7255552651020995599","book_name":"末世调教，绝美女神变奴隶","book_short_name":"月殒余烬","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":379,"name":"求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=379&name=求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7255553466490323495","read_count":"48916","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3149627"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"1510","tags":"科幻末世,重生,末世,求生,无敌,末日求生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/056b76c990c9120e417162e24defb4cc~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779430798&x-signature=IinPfM1jManZ4PKALcSKgE1uCUI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4279725886809144","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"259"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231419584001595F78B7808F884D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读59小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":7,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":622,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":214178,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":16192},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7333947541594014488","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"主角开局道士出身，师傅为救徒弟遭天道反噬而死，身份方面直接起飞。而且中后期。主角直接横推，文笔细腻，细节描写堪称神之一笔，其中每个角色都是现实在末世最真实的反应。 或许因为偏向黑暗末世文的原因。有点讽刺当今社会现实，如果喜欢黑暗末世文的这一本绝对是我读过最好的一本没有之一。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707569508,"group_id":"7255552651020995599","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"高三学生，平凡的我只能靠写写书发发呆刷刷视频通过空暇时间。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8DavYxqpWyDKRMKiGAo+8A=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/ae84fad1e7db4ed9b92ef0d165f3d014~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787573&x-signature=JokeO8lt23XoLRgdRTtSvq4dSos%3D","user_id":"105438891932","user_name":"微风的落叶想吃鸡腿"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"105438891932","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7255552651020995599","book_info":{"abstract":"【全新题材】【末世脑洞】【绝对好看】
